text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起无人机警报：• 对峙线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Israeli military official: Hezbollah is now “restricted” in Bint Jbeil and can no longer launch attacks on northern Israeli communities from that area. IDF: The 98th Division has encircled Bint Jbeil and begun an assault on the town. More than 100 Hezbollah operatives killed in close-quarters and aerial combat over the past week. Dozens of terror sites destroyed, hundreds of weapons found. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列军方官员：真主党目前在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）受到“限制”，无法再从该地区对以色列北部社区发动袭击。以色列国防军（IDF）：第 98 师已包围宾特朱拜勒并开始对该镇进行突击。过去一周，在近距离战斗和空中作战中，有 100 多名真主党武装人员被击毙。数十个恐怖据点被摧毁，发现了数百件武器。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on NATO: "We've spent billions of dollars on that useless organization… and that's going to be under very tough scrutiny from now on." "For years we've paid to protect Europe from Russia… when in reality it's us who end up protecting ourselves alone. It's ridiculous. I've been saying it for a long time. The party's over. Thank you very much." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普谈北约：“我们在那个毫无用处的组织上花费了数十亿美元……从现在起，它将受到非常严格的审查。”“多年来，我们一直在花钱保护欧洲免受俄罗斯的侵害……而实际上，最终保护我们自己的却是我们自己。这太荒谬了。我早就这么说了。派对结束了。非常感谢。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli military official: “Only a small number of terrorists remains in the Bint Jbeil area.” Very soon the IDF will have full control of this important town. IDF: The 98th Division has encircled Bint Jbeil and begun an assault on the town. More than 100 Hezbollah operatives killed in close-quarters and aerial combat over the past week. Dozens of terror sites destroyed, hundreds of weapons found. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列军方官员：“宾特朱拜勒地区只剩下少数恐怖分子。”很快，以色列国防军将完全控制这个重要的城镇。以色列国防军（IDF）：第 98 师已包围宾特朱拜勒并开始对该镇进行突击。过去一周，在近距离战斗和空中作战中，有 100 多名真主党武装人员被击毙。数十个恐怖据点被摧毁，发现了数百件武器。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043610285378801745/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 Drone alerts sounding across northern Israel. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 即时 🔴 以色列北部响起无人机警报。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah tunnel in southern Lebanon. IDF forces destroyed it shortly after. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043621353207496912/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩南部的一条真主党隧道。以色列国防军部队随后将其摧毁。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043621353207496912/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: "Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：“希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，而南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。什么样的战略逻辑可以证明寻求这种合作是合理的，这也是他们无法向我解释的。这很可能是外部压力下强加给政府的。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: "We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043619350683258910/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊与以色列的关系：“我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其冒险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家都没有单独奉行的政策，这其中有非常有趣的方面。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043619350683258910/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo to Reuters: "I don't think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in the way that some people are doing." He said he doesn't "want to get into a debate" with Trump but will "continue to speak out loudly against war, looking to promote peace, promoting dialogue and multilateral relationships among the states to look for just solutions to problems." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 教皇利奥对路透社表示：“我不认为福音的信息应该像某些人那样被滥用。”他说他“不想与特朗普进行辩论”，但将“继续大声疾呼反对战争，寻求促进和平，促进国家间的对话和多边关系，以寻求解决问题的公正方案。”推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 🎯 🚀 Ukrainian MP Fedir Venislavskyi said that Ukraine possesses missiles with a range of up to 500 km that operate at hypersonic speeds and remain largely unknown to the public. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043617651943993616/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇺🇦 🎯 🚀 乌克兰议员费迪尔·韦尼斯拉夫斯基（Fedir Venislavskyi）表示，乌克兰拥有射程达 500 公里的导弹，这些导弹以高超音速飞行，且公众对其知之甚少。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043617651943993616/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The USAF airbridge supporting operations in the Middle East continued at full tilt this morning, with transport flights using Europe as a stepping stone. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043617136170447314/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 支持中东行动的美国空军空中桥梁今天上午继续全速运转，运输航班以欧洲为跳板。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2043617136170447314/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya' command spokesman on Trump's naval blockade: "Regarding the ports in the Gulf and the Sea of Oman, either there will be security for everyone or there will be no security for anyone." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043616922005024997/photo/1 BREAKING 🔴 Iran's military warns no Gulf ports will be safe if its own are threatened. - AFP. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）指挥部发言人谈特朗普的海上封锁：“关于波斯湾和阿曼湾的港口，要么大家都有安全，要么谁都没有安全。”https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043616922005024997/photo/1 快讯 🔴 伊朗军方警告称，如果其自身港口受到威胁，波斯湾将没有港口是安全的。- 法新社。- 开源情报推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz France and the UK will organize a conference in the coming days aimed at restoring freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 法国和英国将在未来几天组织一次会议，旨在恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由。推文

text: Open Source Intel In 2000, Nasrallah stood in Bint Jbeil and declared “the road to Palestine goes through resistance (Islamic terrorism).” In 2006, same field, he called Israel “weaker than a spider’s web.” Today Israel controls that field. The web held. He didn’t. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043616153616982022/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 2000 年，纳斯鲁拉站在宾特朱拜勒宣布“通往巴勒斯坦的道路必须经过抵抗（伊斯兰恐怖主义）”。2006 年，在同一片土地上，他称以色列“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。今天，以色列控制了那片土地。网还在，但他不在了。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043616153616982022/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated "Russians, go home." - in the Hungarian metro. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043616086919160044/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “俄罗斯人，回家吧。” - 在匈牙利地铁上。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043616086919160044/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Macron reiterates the importance of finding a path to peace in Lebanon. French President Emmanuel Macron: "Every effort must be made to reach a solid and lasting settlement of the conflict in the Middle East through diplomacy, a settlement that provides the region with a robust framework allowing everyone to live in peace and security. To achieve this, all substantive issues must be addressed with lasting solutions, Iran's nuclear and ballistic activities, its destabilizing actions in the region, the resumption of free and unimpeded navigation through the Strait of Hormuz as soon as possible, and ensuring Lebanon returns to the path of peace with full respect for its sovereignty and territorial integrity. France is ready to play its full part, as it has been working to do consistently since the first day of the conflict. Regarding the Strait of Hormuz, we will organize with the United Kingdom, in the coming days, a conference with countries ready to contribute alongside us to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation in the strait. This strictly defensive mission, distinct from the belligerents, will be deployed as soon as the situation allows." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 马克龙重申在黎巴嫩寻找和平之路的重要性。法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：“必须尽一切努力通过外交手段达成中东冲突的稳固和持久解决，这一解决方案应为该地区提供一个强有力的框架，使每个人都能在和平与安全中生活。为实现这一目标，必须通过持久的解决方案解决所有实质性问题，包括伊朗的核活动和弹道导弹活动、其在该地区的破坏稳定行动、尽快恢复霍尔木兹海峡的自由和畅通航行，并确保黎巴嫩在充分尊重其主权和领土完整的情况下重返和平之路。法国已准备好发挥其全部作用，正如自冲突第一天起一直致力于做的那样。关于霍尔木兹海峡，我们将在未来几天与英国一起组织一次会议，邀请那些准备与我们一起为和平的多国特派团做出贡献的国家，以恢复海峡的航行自由。这一严格的防御性任务，区别于交战方，将在情况允许时立即部署。” - 开源情报推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @Bacharelhalabi : NEW 🇫🇷 : French President @EmmanuelMacron called for a “rapid, durable diplomatic settlement” to the Middle East conflict, stressing that no effort should be spared to reach a lasting framework for regional security. Macron said such a settlement must address “all underlying issues,” including Iran’s nuclear and ballistic activities, as well as its “destabilising actions” across the region, while ensuring the swift restoration of free and unimpeded navigation through the Strait of #Hormuz . He also underscored the need for Lebanon to “return to the path of peace” with full respect for its sovereignty and territorial integrity. #France , he said, is ready to play its role and has been engaged “since the first day of the conflict.” On #Hormuz , Macron announced that France — alongside the UK — will soon convene a conference with partner countries to establish a multinational, defensive maritime mission aimed at restoring freedom of navigation in the strait, to be deployed once conditions allow. #oott tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @Bacharelhalabi ：最新 🇫🇷 ：法国总统 @EmmanuelMacron 呼吁为中东冲突达成“迅速、持久的外交解决方案”，强调应不遗余力地达成区域安全的长效框架。马克龙表示，此类解决方案必须解决“所有潜在问题”，包括伊朗的核活动和弹道导弹活动，以及其在该地区的“破坏稳定行动”，同时确保迅速恢复霍尔木兹海峡的自由和畅通航行。他还强调，黎巴嫩需要“重返和平之路”，并充分尊重其主权和领土完整。他说，#法国 已准备好发挥其作用，并且“自冲突第一天起”就已参与其中。关于 #霍尔木兹海峡，马克龙宣布法国将与英国一道，很快与伙伴国家召开会议，建立一个多国防御性海上特派团，旨在恢复海峡的航行自由，该特派团将在条件允许时部署。#oott 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel French President Macron confirms France and the UK will host a conference in the coming days aimed at restoring freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz. French President Emmanuel Macron: "Every effort must be made to reach a solid and lasting settlement of the conflict in the Middle East through diplomacy, a settlement that provides the region with a robust framework allowing everyone to live in peace and security. To achieve this, all substantive issues must be addressed with lasting solutions, Iran's nuclear and ballistic activities, its destabilizing actions in the region, the resumption of free and unimpeded navigation through the Strait of Hormuz as soon as possible, and ensuring Lebanon returns to the path of peace with full respect for its sovereignty and territorial integrity. France is ready to play its full part, as it has been working to do consistently since the first day of the conflict. Regarding the Strait of Hormuz, we will organize with the United Kingdom, in the coming days, a conference with countries ready to contribute alongside us to a peaceful multinational mission to restore freedom of navigation in the strait. This strictly defensive mission, distinct from the belligerents, will be deployed as soon as the situation allows." - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT 开源情报 法国总统马克龙证实，法国和英国将在未来几天主办一次会议，旨在恢复霍尔木兹海峡的航行自由。法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：“必须尽一切努力通过外交手段达成中东冲突的稳固和持久解决，这一解决方案应为该地区提供一个强有力的框架，使每个人都能在和平与安全中生活。为实现这一目标，必须通过持久的解决方案解决所有实质性问题，包括伊朗的核活动和弹道导弹活动、其在该地区的破坏稳定行动、尽快恢复霍尔木兹海峡的自由和畅通航行，并确保黎巴嫩在充分尊重其主权和领土完整的情况下重返和平之路。法国已准备好发挥其全部作用，正如自冲突第一天起一直致力于做的那样。关于霍尔木兹海峡，我们将在未来几天与英国一起组织一次会议，邀请那些准备与我们一起为和平的多国特派团做出贡献的国家，以恢复海峡的航行自由。这一严格的防御性任务，区别于交战方，将在情况允许时立即部署。” - 开源情报推文

text: Trump reposts: Trump brilliantly calls Iran’s bluff — with his own Strait of Hormuz blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普转发：特朗普出色地叫板伊朗——用他自己的霍尔木兹海峡封锁。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active near Acre, Kiryat Motzkin, and other surrounding areas in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Krayot • Lower Galilee • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起无人机警报：• 对峙线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部阿卡（Acre）、基里亚特莫茨金（Kiryat Motzkin）及周边地区响起无人机警报：• 对峙线 • 克拉约特（Krayot） • 下加利利 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own. Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊与以色列的关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其冒险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家都没有单独奉行的政策，这其中有非常有趣的方面。希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，而南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。什么样的战略逻辑可以证明寻求这种合作是合理的，这也是他们无法向我解释的。这很可能是外部压力下强加给政府的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: After Iran, Israel cannot live without an enemy. We see that they are in search of developing a new rhetoric and declaring Turkey as the new enemy. We observe this not only in Netanyahu, but also among some figures in the Israeli opposition.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：继伊朗之后，以色列没有敌人就无法生存。我们看到他们正在寻求发展一种新的言论，并将土耳其宣布为新的敌人。我们不仅在内塔尼亚胡身上观察到这一点，在一些以色列反对派人物中也观察到了这一点。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy interior minister Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian said U.S. President Trump’s threat to “destroy our civilisation” is more a joke born of ignorance than a serious analysis. He stated that those who do not understand Iran’s civilisation cannot grasp its depth, even if infrastructure is targeted. He added that when Iranians’ national pride is wounded, they rally in the streets to defend their country, and that even those with grievances against the system show fierce defence when faced with an external threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗内政部副部长阿里·阿克巴尔·普尔贾姆希迪安（Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian）表示，美国总统特朗普关于“摧毁我们文明”的威胁，与其说是严肃的分析，不如说是一个出于无知的笑话。他指出，那些不了解伊朗文明的人无法理解其深度，即使基础设施成为目标。他补充说，当伊朗人的民族自豪感受到伤害时，他们会走上街头保卫国家，即使是那些对体制有不满的人，在面对外部威胁时也会表现出激烈的防御。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起无人机警报：• 对峙线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚（Nahariya）及对峙线周边地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 Due to developments in the Middle East, European farmers are being forced to switch to fertilizers from North Africa, North America, and Russia - the Russian Security Council If the current trajectory of the Middle East conflict persists through the summer, the world could face the largest surge in global food inflation in recent years. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 由于中东局势的发展，欧洲农民被迫转向北非、北美和俄罗斯的化肥 - 俄罗斯安全委员会。如果中东冲突的当前轨迹持续到夏季，世界可能面临近年来全球食品通胀的最大涨幅。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，而南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。什么样的战略逻辑可以证明寻求这种合作是合理的，这也是他们无法向我解释的。这很可能是外部压力下强加给政府的。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has captured Bint Jbeil’s stadium, where in 2000 former Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah delivered a victory speech famously describing Israel as “weaker than a spider web." “Bint Jbeil 2000: There was someone here who spoke and boasted about webs and spiders. Today, that man no longer exists, the stadium is gone, and his words are worth nothing,” said 98th Division commander Brig. Gen. Guy Levy. “Bint Jbeil 2026: Our forces control the area, destroying terror infrastructure and dozens of terrorists.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方占领了宾特朱拜勒的体育场，2000 年前真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉曾在此发表胜利演讲，称以色列“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。“宾特朱拜勒 2000：这里曾有人讲话并吹嘘网和蜘蛛。今天，那个人已不存在，体育场已不复存在，他的话一文不值，”第 98 师指挥官盖伊·列维（Guy Levy）准将说。“宾特朱拜勒 2026：我们的部队控制了该地区，摧毁了恐怖基础设施和数十名恐怖分子。” @wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊与以色列的关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其冒险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家都没有单独奉行的政策，这其中有非常有趣的方面。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部 2 个地区响起无人机警报：• 对峙线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: Pope Leo told Reuters he didn't "want to get into a debate" with Trump. "I don't ‌think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in ‌the way that some people are doing," he said. "I will continue to speak out loudly against war, looking to promote peace, ⁠promoting dialogue and multilateral ​relationships among the states to look ​for just solutions to problems," ​he said.
text_zh: 教皇利奥对路透社表示，他“不想与特朗普进行辩论”。他说：“我不认为福音的信息应该像某些人那样被滥用。”“我将继续大声疾呼反对战争，寻求促进和平，促进国家间的对话和多边关系，以寻求解决问题的公正方案，”他说。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature." The only issue Lebanon’s ambassador can raise is achieving a ceasefire. “If we achieve a ceasefire, it is a good thing; if not, the ambassador cannot cross this red line,” he said. A senior Hezbollah official told RIA Novosti that the Lebanese government’s stance against Hezbollah threatens to split the country. He did not rule out the possibility of replacing the government under pressure from popular protests. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Salam have separated the Lebanese issue from the Iranian issue, and Iran will not be allowed to interfere. The meeting will focus on the need for a ceasefire before talks – a Lebanese condition that has not yet received an Israeli response. Hezbollah’s deputy political chief, Mahmoud Qamati, criticised the Lebanese government for rushing to negotiate with Israel under fire. “Aren’t you ashamed? You, Prime Minister, are not ashamed to go and negotiate while Israel warns you not to talk about a ceasefire?” He added that Israel wants to disarm Hezbollah, calling that an internal Lebanese issue, and warned that external forces are leading Lebanon into anarchy and destruction. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 以色列与黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿以大使级举行。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅（Ghassan Salamé）表示，此次会议不是为了谈判，而是为了“后勤性质的讨论或谈话”。黎巴嫩大使唯一能提出的问题是实现停火。“如果我们实现了停火，那是件好事；如果没有，大使不能越过这条红线，”他说。一位真主党高级官员告诉俄新社，黎巴嫩政府反对真主党的立场威胁到国家分裂。他不排除在民众抗议的压力下更换政府的可能性。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）和总理萨拉姆已将黎巴嫩问题与伊朗问题分开，且不允许伊朗干涉。会议将重点讨论在谈判前实现停火的必要性——这是一个黎巴嫩提出的条件，但尚未得到以色列的回应。真主党副政治首脑马哈茂德·卡马蒂（Mahmoud Qamati）批评黎巴嫩政府在炮火下急于与以色列谈判。“你们不感到羞耻吗？总理先生，在以色列警告你们不要谈论停火的情况下，你们去谈判难道不感到羞耻吗？”他补充说，以色列想要解除真主党的武装，称这是黎巴嫩内部问题，并警告说外部势力正在将黎巴嫩引向无政府状态和毁灭。@wfwitness

text: As the war with Iran dragged on, Israel’s interception rate dropped sharply. At the start, only about 5% of Iranian missiles got through, but in the final week, that rose to 27%. Most of the missiles that hit (about 4 out of 5) carried cluster munitions, and Israel did not have an effective, dedicated defense against them. Source: Haaretz
text_zh: 随着与伊朗战争的拖延，以色列的拦截率急剧下降。起初，只有约 5% 的伊朗导弹突破了防御，但在最后一周，这一比例上升到了 27%。大多数击中目标的导弹（约 5 分之 4）携带了集束弹药，而以色列没有针对它们的有效专用防御手段。来源：国土报

text: BIG: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Syria: Israel’s postponed policies toward Syria carry certain risks. Because of the ongoing war in Iran, Israel may not be taking certain steps right now, but that does not mean it will not do so later. It may simply not be their priority at the moment. That does not mean it will not become a priority later, when the time comes. For now, our Syrian brothers and sisters are engaged in serious diplomatic efforts. However, as I said, Netanyahu and his team’s perspective on this issue is clear. We are aware of it, and we are taking our own measures accordingly.
text_zh: 重磅：土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈叙利亚：以色列对叙利亚推迟的政策带有一定的风险。由于伊朗战争的持续，以色列现在可能没有采取某些步骤，但这并不意味着以后不会。这可能只是目前不是他们的优先事项。这并不意味着当时间到来时，它不会成为优先事项。目前，我们的叙利亚兄弟姐妹正在进行严肃的外交努力。然而，正如我所说，内塔尼亚胡及其团队在这个问题上的观点是明确的。我们意识到了这一点，并正在相应地采取我们自己的措施。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UK Prime Minister: We do not support the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and will not enter any war (with Iran) under any pressure
text_zh: 🇬🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 英国首相：我们不支持封锁霍尔木兹海峡，也不会在任何压力下卷入任何战争（与伊朗的战争）

text: German Chancellor Merz on Hungary election results: I am personally very grateful and relieved about this clear election result in Hungary. This shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many believe. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference. Right-wing populism suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨谈匈牙利选举结果：我个人对匈牙利这次明确的选举结果感到非常感激和欣慰。这表明我们的民主社会比许多人认为的更具韧性。我们的民主可以抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨败。匈牙利发出了一个明确的信号，反对全球范围内的右翼民粹主义。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: The effort to expand territory has always been one of Israel’s objectives. It was waiting for an opportunity to implement this, and after October 2023 it saw that such an opportunity had opened up. Essentially, Israel is not pursuing security, but rather more territory. It presents this expansionism under the guise of security needs. As this becomes more exposed, international awareness grows, and the political rhetoric surrounding the issue begins to shift and produce different effects.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：扩张领土一直是以色列的目标之一。它一直在等待机会实施这一目标，而在 2023 年 10 月之后，它看到了这样的机会已经出现。本质上，以色列追求的不是安全，而是更多的领土。它以安全需求为幌子来展示这种扩张主义。随着这一点变得越来越暴露，国际意识不断增强，围绕该问题的政治言论开始发生转变并产生不同的影响。

text: Keir Starmer: Whatever the pressure, Britain will not be dragged into the Iran war. We’re not supporting the blockade.
text_zh: 基尔·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）：无论压力如何，英国都不会被拖入伊朗战争。我们不支持封锁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 IDF spokesperson Avichay Adrae released a statement: Israeli forces from the 98th Division have completed the encirclement of Bint Jbeil and begun an offensive operation inside the town. The statement said paratroopers, commando units, and the Givati Brigade are expanding ground operations to reinforce forward positions, claiming over 100 Hezbollah fighters were killed and multiple sites and weapons caches were destroyed. The IDF added that operations will continue against Hezbollah and that it will act to prevent threats to Israeli civilians. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发言人阿维查伊·阿德雷（Avichay Adrae）发表声明：以色列第 98 师部队已完成对宾特朱拜勒的包围，并开始在镇内进行进攻行动。声明称，伞兵、突击部队和吉瓦提旅（Givati Brigade）正在扩大地面行动以加强前沿阵地，声称击毙了 100 多名真主党武装人员，并摧毁了多个据点和武器库。以色列国防军补充说，针对真主党的行动将继续进行，并将采取行动防止对以色列平民的威胁。@wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: When you look at the main topics currently under negotiation, it may not be technically realistic to expect them to be finalized and signed into a comprehensive agreement within 15 days. If the parties make good progress, an additional ceasefire period could come onto the agenda — perhaps 45 days or even 60 days — so that negotiations can continue and problems can be resolved during that time.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：当你审视目前正在谈判的主要议题时，期望在 15 天内完成并签署全面协议在技术上可能并不现实。如果各方取得良好进展，可能会将额外的停火期提上议程——也许是 45 天甚至 60 天——以便谈判能够继续，并在那段时间内解决问题。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: As far as I can see, there is currently a sincere need on both sides for a ceasefire. Of course, there is always the Israel factor — Israel’s disruptive role here must always be taken into account. At the moment, both the Americans and the Iranians have returned home. I believe the Iranians, in particular, will evaluate the proposal made by the Americans and will give a response.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：据我所见，目前双方都有真诚的停火需求。当然，总有以色列因素——以色列在这里的破坏性作用必须始终考虑在内。目前，美国人和伊朗人都已回国。我相信伊朗人尤其会评估美国人提出的建议，并会做出回应。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Lebanese Red Cross center in the city of Tyre, killing the injured being transported and causing damage to the vehicles within the facility. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike on the town of Qlaileh in the Tyre region of southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部提尔市的一个红十字中心，杀死了正在被运送的伤员，并损坏了设施内的车辆。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列对黎巴嫩南部提尔地区 Qlaileh 镇进行了空袭。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 MTV: 31 tankers loaded with diesel fuel have arrived at the Masnaa border crossing from Iraq as aid to Lebanon, and are now crossing the border point towards the Zahrani refinery. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 MTV：31 辆装载柴油的油罐车已从伊拉克抵达 Masnaa 边境口岸，作为对黎巴嫩的援助，目前正穿过边境点前往 Zahrani 炼油厂。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted a Lebanese Red Cross center in the city of Tyre, killing the injured being transported and causing damage to the vehicles within the facility. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部提尔市的一个红十字中心，杀死了正在被运送的伤员，并损坏了设施内的车辆。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对峙线地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布，在 4 月 13 日 01:20 至 09:45 之间，他们对基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）、多维夫（Doviv）和什洛米（Shlomi）定居点以及 Matalba 阵地进行了火箭弹和无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli airstrike on Al Mansouri plain, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Reuters: An Israeli airstrike killed an infant girl during her father’s funeral in southern Lebanon, in the village of Srifa. The child, reportedly under two years old, was among several family members killed when their home was struck, while her sister was seriously wounded. The Israeli military said it did not have sufficient details on the incident but stated it takes measures to avoid civilian harm. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部 Al Mansouri 平原。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 路透社：以色列在黎巴嫩南部 Srifa 村的一次空袭中，在一名父亲的葬礼上炸死了一名女婴。据报道，这名不到两岁的女婴在房屋被击中时与多名家庭成员一起丧生，她的姐姐受了重伤。以色列军方表示，没有关于该事件的足够细节，但表示已采取措施避免平民伤害。@wfwitness
